refresh_token.description: Long-lived eBay OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at refresh_token_endpoint via the AuthHook; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

username.description: eBay OAuth 2.0 client id (application client id), sent as the Basic-auth username on the refresh-token exchange. Never logged.

password.description: eBay OAuth 2.0 client secret, sent as the Basic-auth password on the refresh-token exchange. Never logged.

scope.description: Space-separated OAuth scopes requested on the token-refresh grant. Omitted from the token request entirely when unset, matching legacy.

base_url.description: eBay API host override for tests, sandbox, or proxies. Matches legacy's api_host/base_url fallback (api_host takes precedence in legacy; this bundle exposes a single base_url knob — see docs.md Known limits).

refresh_token_endpoint.description: eBay OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for orders/order_line_items/shipping_fulfillments, sent as an eBay creationdate filter (creationdate:[<value>..]). Only used on a fresh sync with no persisted cursor.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000, limit). Matches legacy's defaultPageSize/maxPageSize bounds.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
